parameters.command: mkdir -p /reports/raw && nuclei -u http://dvwa:80 -t /home/node/nuclei-templates -o /reports/raw/nuclei_dvwa.json -json -silent -timeout 30; nuclei -u http://juiceshop:3000 -t /home/node/nuclei-templates -o /reports/raw/nuclei_juiceshop.json -json -silent -timeout 30; nuclei -u http://webgoat:8080 -t /home/node/nuclei-templates -o /reports/raw/nuclei_webgoat.json -json -silent -timeout 30; echo scans_complete
